caption_summary: A middle-aged South Asian man dips a chip into royal icing inside a giant gingerbread house.

panels.description: Medium shot of a middle-aged South Asian man with short, graying hair standing inside a giant gingerbread house, warm indoor lighting highlighting gingerbread walls decorated with candy.
Close-up of the man leaning forward slightly, focused gaze on his hands as he holds a crispy chip poised over a glossy pool of white royal icing.
Tight shot on the man's hands dipping the chip into the thick, shiny royal icing, with soft light reflecting off the icing's surface, conveying a moment of careful action.
